records.ety: [F., fr. Ar. saisabān, seisebān, a kind of tree, fr. Per. sīsabān seed of cinquefoil.]

defs: A leguminous shrub (Sesbania aculeata) which furnishes a fiber used for making ropes.
notes: ☞ The name is applied also to the similar plant, Sesbania Aegyptiaca, and other species of the same genus.
